title: Department Manager Vacancy at Cello Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Cello Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Cello Asia Pacific Associates is actively seeking a talented and motivated Department Manager to join our dynamic team in Patna. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Cello Asia Pacific Associates:
Cello Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cello Asia Pacific Associates!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
